site.name: Our Lady of All Souls Parish

hero.subtitle: A community of faith, hope, and love in the heart of Hamilton.

schedule.title: Mass Schedule
schedule.subtitle: All are welcome to join us for the celebration of the Eucharist.

sacraments.title: Sacraments & Pastoral Services
sacraments.subtitle: We accompany you in the key moments of your faith journey.

items.title: Confessions
items.details: Also available by appointment. Please contact the parish office.

items.title: Baptism
items.details: Registration required at least one month in advance. Available in English and Spanish.

items.title: Marriage
items.details: A marriage preparation course is mandatory. Contact the parish office to begin the process.

items.title: Sick Visits & Holy Communion
items.details: Our ministers bring Holy Communion to the sick and homebound. Contact the parish office to arrange a visit.

sacraments.contactNote: For more information on any sacrament, please contact our parish office at (905) 528-1513.

donations.title: Support Our Parish
donations.subtitle: Your generosity sustains our community and the ministries we share.

interac.title: Interac e-Transfer
interac.instructions: No security question required — your donation arrives automatically.

envelope.title: Weekly Offering Envelope
envelope.description: Pick up your envelope package at the parish office or after any Sunday Mass.

preauthorized.title: Pre-Authorized Monthly Giving
preauthorized.description: Set up automatic monthly contributions. Contact our parish office to enroll.

contact.address: 21 Barton Street West, Hamilton, Ontario  L8L 1A2
officeHoursLines: Mon, Tue, Thu & Fri: 10:00 AM – 4:00 PM

sponsors.title: Community Support
sponsors.subtitle: Proudly supported by our local business partners
sponsors.ctaDescription: Support our parish and connect with our community.
